summary: The diff implements a comprehensive single-page website for 'Not Ya Mama's Cooking' covering all 8 requirements. All major features are present: warm Mexican color palette, logo in header/hero, sticky auto-hiding header, hamburger menu, menu showcase with food cards, catering section, contact section with Jasmine Cota and clickable phone number, and no Caffeine AI branding. All acceptance criteria appear satisfied based on the file summaries and code excerpts.

hallucinated_features.description: Internet Identity authentication scaffolding (useInternetIdentity hook, useActor hook, QueryClient/InternetIdentityProvider wrapping) included in a fully static frontend website
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly states 'No backend logic is required — this is a fully static frontend website' and lists 'User authentication or accounts' as a non-goal. The diff includes useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, and wraps the app in InternetIdentityProvider and QueryClientProvider, which are unnecessary auth/ICP infrastructure.
